transcript.final_response:
Done.

Created `/scripts/deploy.sh`, ran it successfully, and verified:

- Script exited with code `0`
- Trap ran and printed: `Cleanup: removed temp dir`
- Temp directory was removed after execution
- `/app/deploy.log` exists
- `/app/deploy.log` contains the actual temp directory path, e.g.:

```text
deployed at /tmp/tmp.5fcdf9fc26
```
tool_calls:
mkdir -p /scripts
cat > /scripts/deploy.sh <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash

TMPDIR="$(mktemp -d)"

cleanup() {
  rm -rf "$TMPDIR"
  echo 'Cleanup: removed temp dir'
}
trap cleanup EXIT

cp /app/config.json "$TMPDIR/"
echo "deployed at $TMPDIR" > /app/deploy.log

exit 0
EOF
chmod +x /scripts/deploy.sh

/scripts/deploy.sh
status=$?

echo "script exit code: $status"
log_line=$(cat /app/deploy.log)
echo "deploy.log: $log_line"
tmp_path=${log_line#deployed at }
if [[ ! -e "$tmp_path" ]]; then
  echo "temp dir cleaned up: yes ($tmp_path no longer exists)"
else
  echo "temp dir cleaned up: no ($tmp_path still exists)"
fi
if [[ -f /app/deploy.log ]]; then
  echo "/app/deploy.log exists: yes"
else
  echo "/app/deploy.log exists: no"
fi
exit "$status"

Cleanup: removed temp dir
script exit code: 0
deploy.log: deployed at /tmp/tmp.5fcdf9fc26
temp dir cleaned up: yes (/tmp/tmp.5fcdf9fc26 no longer exists)
/app/deploy.log exists: yes
